visual_description:
A young man with dark hair, wearing a dark jacket, stands in the center of the frame, looking slightly off-camera with a serious expression. He is in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with antique-style furniture and objects. The shelves behind him are packed with various items, including what appear to be glassware and other trinkets. The camera is focused on him in a medium shot. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The audio opens with a male voice speaking in a calm, conversational tone, as if making a simple statement. He says, "I was just about to ask you." His voice is steady and even.

The camera cuts to a wider shot, revealing three men in a dark, cluttered space. In the center, a man with platinum blonde hair, dressed in a black suit, points a wand forward with a determined look. To his left, another man in a dark suit also points his wand forward. A third man stands slightly behind them, observing. The room is filled with antique furniture, including a large, ornate mirror and numerous silver bowls and other decorative items scattered on the floor and on shelves
